title: Settings

aboutPage.title: About
aboutPage.description: DEEIX Chat is a model access and conversation operations platform for multi-user AI applications. It unifies the model catalog, multi-provider routing, parameter governance, files and RAG, MCP tools, usage billing, identity security, audit, and operational settings in a single control plane.
aboutPage.license: Code licensed under the Apache License 2.0.

languageDescription: Choose the interface language for this browser and your account.

profile.conversationPreferencesPlaceholder: Preferred style, language habits, output format, and common workflows.

username.invalid: Username must be 3-16 lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens and cannot use a reserved name.
username.alreadyChanged: Username can only be set once.

toast.initialUsernameRequired: Initial username must be changed before continuing.

notifications.responseCompletionDescription: Notify you when a model finishes a response. This is useful for long-running tasks such as tool calls and research.
notifications.unsupportedTitle: Notifications are not supported in this browser
notifications.unsupportedDescription: Use a desktop browser that supports the Notification API.
notifications.deniedDescription: Allow notifications in this site's browser permissions before enabling this option.
notifications.enabledDescription: You will receive a system notification when a reply finishes in the background.
notifications.defaultHelp: When enabled, the browser notification permission is used to alert you through system notifications.
notifications.unsupportedHelp: This browser does not support system notifications.
notifications.deniedHelp: Notifications are blocked by the browser. Allow them manually in browser settings.
notifications.grantedHelp: Browser notifications are enabled. When a model reply finishes, a notification will appear.

avatarDialog.title: Edit avatar
avatarDialog.description: Enter an avatar URL or click the avatar area to generate a pixel-style avatar.

accountPage.title: Account
accountPage.logoutAllDevices: Sign out of all active devices

identity.title: Linked identity providers
identity.empty: No third-party identity provider is linked.
identity.unlinkDisabled: Set a password or link another identity provider first.

deleteDialog.title: Delete account
deleteDialog.description: Deleting your account is permanent. Your account and chat history cannot be restored.

verificationDescription.twoFactor: Enter your authenticator code or a recovery code to delete the account.
verificationDescription.email: Send a code to your verified email, then enter it to delete the account.

deleteDialog.verificationUnavailable: Account deletion requires identity verification. Verify your email or enable two-factor authentication first.

description.required: The initial password must be changed before continuing. This session will expire after the change.
description.change: Your current session will expire after the password is changed. Sign in again with the new password.
description.set: After setting a password, you can sign in with a username and password and use it as a fallback credential before unlinking identity providers.

verificationDescription.twoFactor: Enter your authenticator code or a recovery code to continue.
verificationDescription.email: Send a code to your verified email, then enter it to continue.

placeholders.password: At least 8 characters, not digits only

description.bootstrapVerified: Setting your first email requires verifying ownership of the new address.
description.saveOnly: The email address will be updated after saving.
description.change: DEEIX Chat will ask for the verification required by your account before saving this change.

description.emailBootstrap: Send a code to the new email address, then enter it to save the email.
description.emailChange: Complete the required verification before saving the email change.
description.currentEmail: Send a code to {email}, then enter it to mark the address as verified.

description.setup: Scan the QR code with an authenticator app, or enter the key manually.
description.manage: Enter a code or recovery code to continue.
description.recovery: Recovery codes are shown only once. Save them somewhere safe.

twoFactor.qrUnavailable: QR code unavailable. Use the manual key instead.
twoFactor.scanThenVerify: Scan the code, then enter a verification code to finish setup.

toasts.passwordChangedDescription: Please sign in again with your new password.
toasts.providerUnavailable: This identity provider is not available for binding.

defaultModel.title: Default model for new chats
defaultModel.description: The model preselected for new chats. Leave empty to use the first available system-recommended model.
defaultModel.autoTitleDescription: When disabled, new chats use the first 20 characters of the first message as the title.

input.shortcutDescription: This platform uses {shortcut} to submit messages.
input.heightDescription: Controls the maximum height allowed when the input box auto-expands.
input.restoreDraftDescription: Controls whether failed sends automatically restore the text and attachments from that attempt.
input.preserveDraftDescription: Controls whether unsent content is kept and restored when switching conversations.
input.deleteFilesDefaultTitle: Delete files by default when deleting chats
input.deleteFilesDefaultDescription: When enabled, delete confirmations select file deletion by default. Files still referenced by other conversations are kept.

display.markdownDescription: Controls whether AI replies are rendered as formatted Markdown.
display.modelDescription: Controls whether the model used for this call appears below AI replies.
display.tokenDescription: Controls whether token usage for the request appears below AI replies.
display.latencyDescription: Controls whether total call latency appears below AI replies.
display.costDescription: Controls whether total call cost appears below AI replies.
display.costDescriptionSelfMode: Controls whether total call cost appears below AI replies. Hidden in self-use mode.

context.autoCompactDescription: When a conversation approaches the model limit, earlier messages are summarized automatically to keep the conversation continuous. Turn this off to compact manually.

modeDescription.auto: Current: Auto. The system chooses full-context injection or RAG based on file size, type, context budget, and retrieval capability.
modeDescription.fullContext: Current: Full context. Later turns try to include conversation file content directly, which works best for precise analysis of small files.
modeDescription.rag: Current: RAG. Later turns retrieve relevant file chunks first, then fall back to full-context injection when retrieval is unavailable.

memory.addDescription: Saved preferences are used as long-term guidance for AI replies.
memory.name: Name
memory.contentPlaceholder: Example: concise and direct, avoid filler

billingTooltip.cacheWritePricingNote: Claude cache read uses configured pricing; cache write 5m uses 1.25x, 1h uses 2x, and Fast Mode applies another 6x on top.
billingTooltip.claudeCacheWriteMixedNote: Claude cache write uses configured pricing at {multiplier}.
billingTooltip.claudeCacheWriteNote: Claude {timeout} cache write uses configured pricing at {multiplier}.
billingTooltip.claudeFastModeNote: Claude Fast Mode bills input, output, and cache usage at {multiplier}.

features.freeModelsNotIncluded: Free models do not count toward the credit.

payment.title: Payment method
payment.description: Confirm the payment method to continue.
payment.renewDescription: Renewal adds time to your current plan.
payment.renewAfterHigherDescription: This renews with the selected plan. Your current higher-tier entitlement and credit stay unchanged, and the new plan starts after the higher-tier entitlement ends.
payment.upgradeDescription: The higher plan starts immediately and unused entitlement is preserved after it.

redemption.title: Redemption code
redemption.description: Enter the redemption code provided by an administrator.

toasts.checkoutURLMissing: The payment provider did not return a checkout URL.
toasts.invalidTopUpAmountDescription: Enter a USD amount greater than 0.
toasts.planUnavailableDescription: This plan has no available price. Ask an administrator to check the billing configuration.
toasts.paymentDisabledDescription: Configure a payment provider in the admin console before subscribing to a paid plan.
toasts.freeSwitchBlockedDescription: You cannot switch to Free before paid entitlements expire. Renew or choose another paid plan instead.
